name: golang-github-atombender-go-jsonschema-dev
title: golang-github-atombender-go-jsonschema-dev
summary: generate Go data types from JSON Schema definitions (library)
description:
generate Go data types from JSON Schema definitions (library)
go-jsonschema is a tool to generate Go data types from JSON Schema
definitions: http://json-schema.org/
.
This tool generates Go data types and structs that corresponds to
definitions in the schema, along with unmarshalling code that validates
the input JSON according to the schema's validation rules.
.
This package contains the Go library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-atombender-go-jsonschema-dev because generate Go data types from JSON Schema definitions (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-atombender-go-jsonschema-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-atombender-go-jsonschema-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-atombender-go-jsonschema-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
